data.description: The cryptocurrency Cosmos (ATOM) is currently trading at $4.22. The MACD indicator is showing a bearish trend, while the RSI indicator is neutral. This suggests that traders may experience a consolidation phase in the near future, with potential opportunities for trading.

data.title: EpicQuest Education sees 5x rise in intl student enrollment at Davis University over 2 years.
data.description: EpicQuest Education Group International Limited (EEIQ), a company specializing in higher education for both domestic and international students across the US, Canada, and the UK, released a recent update in Toledo, Ohio on September 24, 2025. The company, listed on NASDAQ, caters to students seeking quality education in various countries.

data.title: TCL SunPower Global joins Solar Stewardship Initiative for sustainability in solar industry. Lyon, Sept 24, 2025.
data.description: In Lyon, France on September 24, 2025, TCL SunPower Global revealed its participation in the Solar Stewardship Initiative (SSI), an international project aimed at advancing transparency, accountability, and sustainability in the solar energy sector. TCL SunPower Global, an influential player in the solar energy solutions industry, has joined the SSI to bolster its commitment to responsible practices.

data.title: CoinW to be Platinum Sponsor at TOKEN2049 Singapore, celebrating 8 years of innovation with "Crypto Marathon Spirit" theme.
data.description: In Hong Kong on September 24, 2025, CoinW, a prominent worldwide cryptocurrency trading platform, revealed its sponsorship of TOKEN2049 Singapore as a Platinum Sponsor. During the event, CoinW will organize various activities centered around the "Crypto Marathon Spirit" theme. This will include keynote speeches and panels featuring industry experts.

data.title: TelevisaUnivision targets Google's discriminatory practices against Hispanic viewers by launching "Do the Right Thing Google" campaign.
data.description: In Miami today, TelevisaUnivision unveiled its new advertising campaign titled "Do the Right Thing Google," addressing Google's YouTube TV. The campaign highlights Google's decision to exclude Univision from its primary programming bundle starting on September 30. This move is set to impact numerous Hispanic viewers, who will be faced with an 18% increase in cost to retain access to favored Spanish-language content. The campaign aims to draw awareness to what is being called a "Hispanic tax" and will reach a nationwide audience.

data.title: Encore Capital Group plans to offer $400 million senior secured notes due 2031 for institutional buyers.
data.description: On September 24, 2025, a company based in San Diego, Encore Capital Group, Inc. (Nasdaq: ECPG), revealed its plan to potentially issue $400.0 million in senior secured notes due 2031. This offering is contingent on market conditions and other factors and will be conducted through a private offering to qualified institutional buyers in accordance with Rule 144A under the Securities Act of 1933. The notes will also be available to non-U.S. persons outside the United States as defined by Regulation S under the Securities Act.

data.title: Bitcoin Cash (BCH) dips 0.43% to $560.30, near $560 support as bearish trend persists on various timeframes.
data.description: The price of BCH has decreased by 0.43% to $560.30, as it nears crucial support levels amidst an emerging bearish trend detected on various timeframes.

data.title: ShopLiftr offers data-driven retail agility with L-Bar video, infusing live promotions into ads for in-store sales lift.
data.description: ShopLiftr, a technology platform, allows for comprehensive retail flexibility and efficiency from shelf offers to screen, facilitating the integration of real-time promotions into programmatic advertisements. This system also verifies the impact on sales growth specifically within physical stores. The innovation is designed to cater to various retail environments and enhance agility on a large scale. The company is headquartered in Ottawa, Ontario, and the announcement was made on September 24, 2025. This advancement reflects the evolving strategies in branding and retail as numbers continue to drive the industry forward.

data.title: American Global Strategies LLC (AGS) partners with Checkmate Government Relations to offer clients enhanced services.
data.description: American Global Strategies LLC (AGS), a prominent international advisory and consulting firm, revealed their partnership with Checkmate Government Relations led by Ches McDowell on September 24, 2025. This collaboration aims to provide clients with enhanced services and expertise.

data.title: Base Power launches in Houston, offering home backup power with all-in-one energy plan, expanding service into large energy market.
data.description: Base Power, the exclusive energy provider in Texas offering home backup power, has launched its services in Houston. This expansion into one of the nation's biggest energy markets marks a significant milestone for the company. Base provides a comprehensive energy package featuring a whole-home backup battery, without the necessity for solar panels, although it is compatible for households with solar setup. In case of a grid failure, the battery seamlessly powers the entire home. This innovative offering caters to the needs of Houston residents seeking reliable energy solutions.

data.title: Securian Canada launches Creditor Insurance Digital Claims Portal for easy claim submission and tracking.(Numbers: multiple types of claims, collaboration with a leading Tier 1 Canadian bank, personalized bilingual portal)
data.description: Securian Canada has unveiled the Creditor Insurance Digital Claims Portal, a new online platform designed to streamline the process of submitting, managing, and tracking creditor insurance claims for customers. This initiative, developed in partnership with a top Tier 1 Canadian bank, offers a personalized bilingual portal for customers to submit critical illness, disability, and job loss claims digitally. Users also have the flexibility to opt for traditional paper claim submissions. This portal aims to enhance efficiency and speed up the claims process.
